channel.title: __elfie___
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from __elfie___

item.title: In love with the new additions 😍 It feels so good to be altering my look again both with new piercings & new hair projects. It’s a genuine joy getting new piercings after all this time! When they’re all settled in I have some cool jewellery in mind, but
item.description: In love with the new additions 😍 It feels so good to be altering my look again both with new piercings & new hair projects. It’s a genuine joy getting new piercings after all this time! When they’re all settled in I have some cool jewellery in mind, but

item.title: Don’t pick ya damn crusties! 🖤 I do this aftercare about 2-3 times a day & ensure i’m showering daily as well ✨ I don’t recommend using Hirudoid cream for every piercing, but for something like eyebrows, dermals or surface piercings where they tend to bru
item.description: Don’t pick ya damn crusties! 🖤 I do this aftercare about 2-3 times a day & ensure i’m showering daily as well ✨ I don’t recommend using Hirudoid cream for every piercing, but for something like eyebrows, dermals or surface piercings where they tend to bru

item.description: I have a new hair project brewing! What colour so you think i’m going next? 🤭 #althair #alternativehair #elfears #earpointing

item.title: My baby boy Ghost coming in to defend his little brother Jasper 😾🖤 So small but so fierce 😼 #kittens #catcontent #anxiety Also don’t mind the mess, this is right when i’d just moved back home in 2021 ✨🙇🏼
item.description: My baby boy Ghost coming in to defend his little brother Jasper 😾🖤 So small but so fierce 😼 #kittens #catcontent #anxiety Also don’t mind the mess, this is right when i’d just moved back home in 2021 ✨🙇🏼

item.title: Always getting Bridle Bar Q’s! 🧝🏻✨ I had mine made by Tidus over at @AestheticAmbition it’s made out of Niobium so it’s perfectly safe for 24/7 wear & i’ve had mine on since 2021! Each nose is entirely unique so getting one custom made not only to suit yo
item.description: Always getting Bridle Bar Q’s! 🧝🏻✨ I had mine made by Tidus over at @AestheticAmbition it’s made out of Niobium so it’s perfectly safe for 24/7 wear & i’ve had mine on since 2021! Each nose is entirely unique so getting one custom made not only to suit yo

item.title: Replying to @Meebo 🇵🇸 You cannot put a price on your physical & mental health. Do NOT go to an artist *just* because they are close by to you, you will more than likely have to travel (sometimes overseas) to visit a GOOD artist. Good quality heavy mods ar
item.description: Replying to @Meebo 🇵🇸 You cannot put a price on your physical & mental health. Do NOT go to an artist *just* because they are close by to you, you will more than likely have to travel (sometimes overseas) to visit a GOOD artist. Good quality heavy mods ar

item.title: You’ll never know where you end up, you just have to keep moving forward 🖤 The person I was in 2020 was isolated, disassociated, in deep derealisation & so lost within themselves. I had just accepted my life would be that way forever & I didn’t see a way
item.description: You’ll never know where you end up, you just have to keep moving forward 🖤 The person I was in 2020 was isolated, disassociated, in deep derealisation & so lost within themselves. I had just accepted my life would be that way forever & I didn’t see a way

item.title: Replying to @Amanda Sadly the modern medical world views heavy body mods as “undesirable.” Getting these procedures done means finding & researching heavy body modification artists. No matter the work you’re looking at getting done, whether it’s major sur
item.description: Replying to @Amanda Sadly the modern medical world views heavy body mods as “undesirable.” Getting these procedures done means finding & researching heavy body modification artists. No matter the work you’re looking at getting done, whether it’s major sur

item.title: Give yourself & your artist the best chance of success 🖤 This is in no way attempting to shame anyone for their choices, you truly need to be so well informed before deciding to get this sort of work done. Not only for yourself & your safety, but for the
item.description: Give yourself & your artist the best chance of success 🖤 This is in no way attempting to shame anyone for their choices, you truly need to be so well informed before deciding to get this sort of work done. Not only for yourself & your safety, but for the

item.title: #stitch with @Skylar For anyone looking into or having already booked heavy mod work: Do your research, seek out my other content regarding Heavy Body Modification. Seek out other industry professionals all around the world. People like Lynn Loheide. List
item.description: #stitch with @Skylar For anyone looking into or having already booked heavy mod work: Do your research, seek out my other content regarding Heavy Body Modification. Seek out other industry professionals all around the world. People like Lynn Loheide. List

item.title: After many sessions & lots of laughs my artist Lauren Fox & I entered & won TWO awards at first Iron Gate Tattoo Convention for the incredible work she did on me! We came runner up in Best Neo Traditional & Best Large Colour! 🖤 So SO well deserved 🥹 It wa
item.description: After many sessions & lots of laughs my artist Lauren Fox & I entered & won TWO awards at first Iron Gate Tattoo Convention for the incredible work she did on me! We came runner up in Best Neo Traditional & Best Large Colour! 🖤 So SO well deserved 🥹 It wa

item.title: Please check out my body mod playlist for indepth coverage regarding the severity of getting this sort of work done 🖤 This is a usually how the conversation goes whenever someone asks about my mods 🤭 #bodymods #bodymodification #elfears #earpointing #pier
item.description: Please check out my body mod playlist for indepth coverage regarding the severity of getting this sort of work done 🖤 This is a usually how the conversation goes whenever someone asks about my mods 🤭 #bodymods #bodymodification #elfears #earpointing #pier

item.title: About 13 going on 14 years this little 💩 has been stuck with me 😌 I don’t really have any pics from 2012 - what a time 😬 We’ve seen each other go through so many phases of life together & it’s genuinly beyond a blessing to still call you my best friend 🖤
item.description: About 13 going on 14 years this little 💩 has been stuck with me 😌 I don’t really have any pics from 2012 - what a time 😬 We’ve seen each other go through so many phases of life together & it’s genuinly beyond a blessing to still call you my best friend 🖤

item.title: That second picture, a forced smile, gaunt & done with life. Such sad, tired, lifeless eyes. I wish I could fully tell my story, but these pictures convey the hell just enough. #narcissist #survivingabuse
item.description: That second picture, a forced smile, gaunt & done with life. Such sad, tired, lifeless eyes. I wish I could fully tell my story, but these pictures convey the hell just enough. #narcissist #survivingabuse

item.title: A small (pardon the pun) portion of the other side of what I do outside of Body Modification & Alt Fashion content! Some of the audio cuts out here & there, my bad 😩 Feel free to comment on how strange he is 🖤 #onlinesw #of #sph #tattoos #dominatrix
item.description: A small (pardon the pun) portion of the other side of what I do outside of Body Modification & Alt Fashion content! Some of the audio cuts out here & there, my bad 😩 Feel free to comment on how strange he is 🖤 #onlinesw #of #sph #tattoos #dominatrix

item.title: My eyebrows are angry because i’ve been very unwell the last few months, they’re still healing! Everything else is about 6 years old, including my ear pointing🧝🏻#earpointing #piercingtour #piercings #bodymods #bodymodification
item.description: My eyebrows are angry because i’ve been very unwell the last few months, they’re still healing! Everything else is about 6 years old, including my ear pointing🧝🏻#earpointing #piercingtour #piercings #bodymods #bodymodification

item.title: Replying to @Neeka Neon Everything you need to know about nape dermals/dermal anchors/single point piercings & my experiences with them for over 6+ years 🖤 #dermalpiercing #napedermals #napepiercing #piercing #bodymods
item.description: Replying to @Neeka Neon Everything you need to know about nape dermals/dermal anchors/single point piercings & my experiences with them for over 6+ years 🖤 #dermalpiercing #napedermals #napepiercing #piercing #bodymods

item.title: This video is not targeted at anyone specifically, rather just a PSA to both content creators & the consumers of their content. Bodily autonomy is so important, so let’s keep each other safe so we can continue to enjoy expressing our true selves 🖤 #bodymo
item.description: This video is not targeted at anyone specifically, rather just a PSA to both content creators & the consumers of their content. Bodily autonomy is so important, so let’s keep each other safe so we can continue to enjoy expressing our true selves 🖤 #bodymo

item.title: My Discord Server for Heavy Body Modification, Tattoos, Piercing & Alternative Fashion is now open & awaiting my community. The invite is over on my IG 🖤✨ See you there 👋🏻 #discord #bodymodification #tattoos #piercing #pointedears #tonguesplit
item.description: My Discord Server for Heavy Body Modification, Tattoos, Piercing & Alternative Fashion is now open & awaiting my community. The invite is over on my IG 🖤✨ See you there 👋🏻 #discord #bodymodification #tattoos #piercing #pointedears #tonguesplit

item.title: You buy the ticket, you ride the ride 🤷🏼 but that doesn’t mean that I haven’t heard some of *the most* out of pocket things both right to my face & when they think I can’t hear them 🤣 family members, total strangers it doesn’t matter, it leaves me laughin
item.description: You buy the ticket, you ride the ride 🤷🏼 but that doesn’t mean that I haven’t heard some of *the most* out of pocket things both right to my face & when they think I can’t hear them 🤣 family members, total strangers it doesn’t matter, it leaves me laughin

item.title: Happy 6 years to my ears! 🎉 They actually turn 6 on the 23rd & 24th of October. Don’t mind my eyebrow piercings, they’re a little grumpy with me today~ #bodymods #bodymodification #earpointing #elfears
